channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KSHTV727RMXBTVPXJNCTF1X1
item.description: In n8n, “Bearer Auth” and “Header Auth” are functionally identical if you set the header to Authorization: Bearer . Pick Bearer Auth when the server expects that header — it’s self-documenting. Pick Header Auth for non-standard headers like X-API-Key. That’s the only difference. #n8n #selfhosted
item.content:encoded: In n8n, “Bearer Auth” and “Header Auth” are functionally identical if you set the header to Authorization: Bearer . Pick Bearer Auth when the server expects that header — it’s self-documenting. Pick Header Auth for non-standard headers like X-API-Key. That’s the only difference. #n8n #selfhosted

item.title: Lumina FInance
item.description:
Lumina FInance

A feature rich, self hostable alternative for managing your personal finances
item.content:encoded:
Lumina FInance

A feature rich, self hostable alternative for managing your personal finances

item.title: FormTo
item.description:
FormTo

FormTo, a simple, self-hosted backend for HTML forms. Add one action attribute to your form and submissions land in your dashboard. Email, Telegram, Slack and webhook notifications. - lumizone/formto: FormTo, a simple, self-hosted backend for HTML forms. Add one action attribute to your form and submissions land in your dashboard. Email, Telegram, Slack and webhook notifications.
item.content:encoded:
FormTo

FormTo, a simple, self-hosted backend for HTML forms. Add one action attribute to your form and submissions land in your dashboard. Email, Telegram, Slack and webhook notifications. - lumizone/formto: FormTo, a simple, self-hosted backend for HTML forms. Add one action attribute to your form and submissions land in your dashboard. Email, Telegram, Slack and webhook notifications.

item.title: Condensit
item.description:
Condensit

Self-hosted AI news digest. Collect RSS feeds, YouTube channels, website diffs, Google News searches, Hacker News, Reddit, GitHub Releases, and podcasts, summarize with a local LLM (Ollama) or OpenRouter, learn your preferences from star ratings and engagement signals, and read a daily digest in the browser.
item.content:encoded:
Condensit

Self-hosted AI news digest. Collect RSS feeds, YouTube channels, website diffs, Google News searches, Hacker News, Reddit, GitHub Releases, and podcasts, summarize with a local LLM (Ollama) or OpenRouter, learn your preferences from star ratings and engagement signals, and read a daily digest in the browser.

item.title: Actual MCP
item.description:
Actual MCP

Model Context Protocol for Actual Budget API.
item.content:encoded:
Actual MCP

Model Context Protocol for Actual Budget API.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRZBHC1XNEGDWP0MH8WSJQ7G
item.description: When setting #Dex as OIDC provider for #PangolinTunnel, it is important to use email as the Identifier Path. The default sub will not work. Try it! deuts.org/∞
item.content:encoded: When setting #Dex as OIDC provider for #PangolinTunnel, it is important to use email as the Identifier Path. The default sub will not work. Try it! deuts.org/∞

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRQQ4HMG1EH0G6PXRC5DYGV2
item.description: Aside from consuming too many resources, especially memory, my other gripe with #PangolinTunnel, at least for its community edition, which a lot of members of the #selfhosted community love, quite a number of its features are getting put behind their paywall. Time for the community to step up and offer a better solution.
item.content:encoded: Aside from consuming too many resources, especially memory, my other gripe with #PangolinTunnel, at least for its community edition, which a lot of members of the #selfhosted community love, quite a number of its features are getting put behind their paywall. Time for the community to step up and offer a better solution.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRNE0ESDA0HF6Z8GFS6YXBKB
item.description: I’m still confused which notes app to stick to for good, #Outline or #Obsidian?
item.content:encoded: I’m still confused which notes app to stick to for good, #Outline or #Obsidian?

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRN4RT9T6T0PMGTMYD7SWYG6
item.description: @stefano I’ve been a fan of Grist for a year now or so. I’ve been using it for some of my several personal projects. I hope to make it an important tool in some of my work projects, but joining Grist instead would be the ultimate dream.
item.content:encoded: @stefano I’ve been a fan of Grist for a year now or so. I’ve been using it for some of my several personal projects. I hope to make it an important tool in some of my work projects, but joining Grist instead would be the ultimate dream.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRN2SZCN6W6K2TE5RG44AVM8
item.description: I’ve been going to coworking spaces like KMC for the last 2 weeks, and at 46 it feels like I’m the oldest remote worker around.
item.content:encoded: I’ve been going to coworking spaces like KMC for the last 2 weeks, and at 46 it feels like I’m the oldest remote worker around.
